title: Toulouse, Occitanie — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Toulouse, Occitanie: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Toulouse is a city in Occitanie with a population of 493,000. The Pink City, a hub for aerospace innovation with Airbus, terracotta architecture, and a vibrant student life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
